# Custom Python Logic Linter CLI

A CLI-based Python linter for solo developers that uses a custom engine to identify specific code patterns or logic flaws not covered by standard tools. It aims to provide highly specialized feedback for local development workflows.

## Guidance

The tool should focus on developer experience and custom rule definition. It needs to leverage Python's AST for code analysis.

## Tech Stack

Python, AST module, Click or Typer for CLI
